title: Best Years Knitted Organic Cotton White Bunny Rabbit Baby Rattle. Suitable from Birth
features: SOFT & GENTLE ORGANIC COTTON: Crafted from organic cotton yarn, this bunny rattle provides a gentle touch on your baby’s delicate skin, ensuring maximum comfort during playtime.
ECO-FRIENDLY & SUSTAINABLE: Filled with recycled polyester, this toy supports eco-friendly practices, making it a responsible choice for environmentally-conscious parents.
SAFE FROM BIRTH: Rigorously tested and certified as safe from birth, you can trust that this bunny rattle meets high safety standards (UKCA & CE) for your newborn’s well-being.

EASY TO CLEAN: Designed with busy parents in mind, this bunny rattle is machine washable, ensuring that keeping it clean and hygienic is a breeze. Simply pop it into the washing machine to maintain its softness and keep it looking new.

IDEAL GIFT FOR ANY OCCASION: With its neutral white colour and charming design, this bunny rattle makes a perfect gift for baby showers, newborns, or as a delightful addition to any baby’s toy collection. Wonderful as a new born baby gift.
description: Product Description Introducing the Best Years Knitted Organic Cotton White Bunny Rabbit Rattle, the perfect companion for your newborn. This charming bunny rattle, crafted from organic cotton yarn and filled with recycled polyester, ensures a soft and safe experience for your baby. Its neutral white colour makes it an ideal gift for any baby shower or new arrival. The bunny rattle features a sweet smile and a soothing sound, making it an instant favourite for both babies and toddlers. Tested and certified as suitable from birth, this bunny toy is machine washable, ensuring easy maintenance for busy parents. Measuring approximately 26cm in height and 11cm in width, the bunny rattle is the perfect size for little hands to grasp and shake. With its ethical sourcing and safety certifications (UKCA & CE), you can trust that this bunny rattle is both safe and sustainable. Bring joy and comfort to your baby with the Best Years Knitted Organic Cotton White Bunny Rabbit Rattle. Safety Warning Suitable from birth
